steps.assistant_text: Cross-module masked-twin sweep grouped game_libs_func_0006C87C with the matched kernel func_80002B78 (kernel_056.c) in a strict 12-insn signature cluster; reloc-masked word comparison showed 0 non-reloc diffs. Needs -mips3 (IDO inlines the d-arithmetic instead of jal-to-self) which the -mips2 parent TU cannot use, so the donor (game_libs_mips3_6C740.c, -O2 -mips3) is compiled and spliced into game_libs_post1b2c.c.o via REPLACE_FUNC_BODY. Same recipe as the landed game_libs_func_0006C8AC divmod.
